subcodes.first_line: O well-wisher of Britain! Thy letter was received and thy benevolent intentions became known [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خیرخواه بریتانیا نامه شما رسید و مقاصد خیریه شما معلوم گردید اتحاد و اتفاق
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @love and unity, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @nationalism; love of country
